/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -pie --coverage -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/euxis-identity-cpp_tests.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/euxis-identity-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_did.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-identity-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_credentials.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-identity-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_attestation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-identity-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_registry.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-identity-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_erc8004.cpp.o" -o euxis-identity-cpp_tests  libeuxis-identity-cpp.a /usr/lib/libgtest_main.so.1.17.0 /usr/lib/libsodium.so /usr/lib/libspdlog.so.1.17.0 /usr/lib/libfmt.so.12.1.0 /usr/lib/libgtest.so.1.17.0
